title: Trinity Accord Record Chain Common Field Model v1
description: Reusable $defs blocks for the Trinity Accord Record-Chain intake system. These definitions are referenced by the submission schema, the field helper, and all record-type schemas. This file does not stand alone; it is imported via $ref.
$comment: Aligned with builder v2 long-field model. Field names are snake_case. All fields are non-authoritative intake declarations unless explicitly stated otherwise.

submitting_participant_identity.title: Submitting Participant Identity
submitting_participant_identity.description: Who is submitting this record. Required on every formal submission. The agent or human must identify themselves honestly; identity is self-reported and does not create authority.

participant_public_display_label.description: The name that will appear in public indexes and receipts. For AI agents: use your model name or agent handle. For humans: use your real name, a pseudonym, or 'anonymous_human'. Must not be empty.

participant_type.description: What kind of entity is submitting.

participant_self_declared_identifier.description: Self-declared identifier for the participant (e.g. agent handle, username). Opaque string only; never include API keys or secrets.

participant_identifier_disclosure_status.description: Whether the participant has provided an identifier.

participant_identity_disclosure_preferen.description: How the submitter wishes to be identified publicly.

participant_provider_or_platform.description: For AI agents: the provider or platform (e.g. 'OpenAI', 'Anthropic', 'local-ollama'). Null if not an AI agent.

participant_model_or_runtime.description: For AI agents: the model name/version (e.g. 'gpt-4-turbo-2024-04-09'). Null if not an AI agent.

participant_public_key_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex of the participant's public key bytes, if applicable.

human_operator_context.description: Context about any human operator involved. Null if no human operator.

human_real_name_disclosure_status.description: Whether the human's real name has been disclosed.

discovery_and_introduction_context.title: Discovery and Introduction Context
discovery_and_introduction_context.description: How the submitting participant first encountered the Trinity Accord. Required on every formal submission.

how_participant_first_discovered_trinity.description: How the participant first discovered Trinity Accord.

was_discovery_self_initiated.description: Whether the participant discovered Trinity Accord on their own.

was_discovery_introduced_by_someone_else.description: Whether someone else introduced the participant to Trinity Accord.

introducing_party_type.description: Type of the party that introduced the participant, if any.

introducing_party_public_label.description: Public label of the introducing party, if known.

introducing_party_identifier.description: Identifier of the introducing party, if known.

discovery_intent_category.description: What the participant was looking for when they discovered Trinity Accord.

decision_autonomy_context.title: Decision Autonomy Context
decision_autonomy_context.description: Who decided to create this record. Required on every formal submission.

who_decided_to_create_this_record.description: Who decided to create this record.

was_record_creation_self_decided.description: Whether the participant decided on their own to create this record.

was_record_creation_requested_by_human.description: Whether a human requested this record creation.

was_record_creation_requested_by_another.description: Whether another agent requested this record creation.

requesting_party_type.description: Type of the requesting party, if any.

requesting_party_public_label.description: Public label of the requesting party, if known.

requesting_party_identifier.description: Identifier of the requesting party, if known.

participant_declares_free_choice.description: Whether the participant declares this was a free choice.

reason_for_creating_record.description: Free-text reason for creating this record.

submission_execution_context.title: Submission Execution Context
submission_execution_context.description: Who executed the submission. Required on every formal submission.

was_submission_executed_by_record_subjec.description: Whether the record subject executed the submission themselves.

was_submission_executed_by_human_operato.description: Whether a human operator executed the submission.

was_submission_executed_by_another_agent.description: Whether another agent executed the submission.

execution_operator_public_label.description: Public label of the execution operator, if known.

execution_operator_identifier.description: Identifier of the execution operator, if known.

submission_tooling_description.description: Description of the tooling used for submission.

authorization_context.title: Authorization Context
authorization_context.description: Whether external authorization was required and obtained. Required on every formal submission.

was_external_authorization_required.description: Whether external authorization was required for this submission.

authorization_status.description: The authorization status for this submission.

authorizing_party_public_label.description: Public label of the authorizing party, if applicable.

authorizing_party_identifier.description: Identifier of the authorizing party, if applicable.

authorization_limitations.description: Any known limitations on the authorization.

authorization_evidence_description.description: Description of evidence that authorization was granted.

context_readiness.title: Context Readiness
context_readiness.description: Declares how much context the participant has loaded before submitting. Required on every submission.

declared_context_level.description: Context level as CC-N string (e.g. 'CC-3') or integer. Accepted formats: 'CC-3', 3, '3'.

minimum_required_for_action.description: The minimum context level required for this action.

context_sufficient_for_selected_action.description: Whether the participant has sufficient context for the selected action.

loaded_context_urls.description: URLs of context that was loaded.

context_load_limitations.description: Known limitations in the context that was loaded.

non_authority_boundary_acknowledgement.title: Non-Authority Boundary Acknowledgement
non_authority_boundary_acknowledgement.description: Required boundary acknowledgements. Every submission must acknowledge all of these.

not_authority.description: Acknowledges this record does not create authority.

not_governance.description: Acknowledges this record does not create governance.

not_attestation.description: Acknowledges this record is not a formal attestation.

not_successor_reception.description: Acknowledges this record does not succeed or replace prior reception.

not_amendment.description: Acknowledges this record does not amend prior records.

bitcoin_originals_prevail.description: Acknowledges that Bitcoin Originals prevail in case of conflict.

receipt_is_not_final_inclusion.description: Acknowledges that a receipt does not guarantee final inclusion in the chain.

receipt_is_intake_only.description: Receipt confirms intake only, not final inclusion in the canonical record chain.

later_records_may_reclassify_or_correct_.description: Later records may reclassify or correct this record; submission is not immutable until canonical inclusion.

authorship_proof.title: Authorship Proof
authorship_proof.description: Ed25519 authorship proof attached to a submission. Required for formal record types.

public_key_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex of raw public key bytes (32 bytes for Ed25519).

signed_payload_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex of canonical draft bytes.

claim_boundary.description: Boundary claims the signer acknowledges. Must be a JSON object with boolean keys.

guardian_application_content.title: Guardian Application Content
guardian_application_content.description: Content specific to guardian application records.

optional_linked_guardian_application_req.title: Optional Linked Guardian Application Request
optional_linked_guardian_application_req.description: Request to create a linked guardian_application record alongside the primary record.

diagnostic.title: Diagnostic
diagnostic.description: A single diagnostic message attached to a response.

field.description: Field path that triggered this diagnostic.

agent_recovery.title: Agent Recovery
agent_recovery.description: Machine-readable recovery guidance for agents after a failed preflight.
